import io
import string

fn find_eq(_ s: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut result: Option<Int> = None
  mut found = false
  while i < n and not found
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61
        result = Some(i)
        found = true
      end
    when None
      found = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  match find_eq(line)
  when Some(idx)
    if idx > 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
      let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, string.len(line))
      println("#{key}:#{value}")
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
